batchRecommendations.description: All PebbloPedia pages use identical long suffix. Change KO template to 'X란? 5단계 난이도 해설 | 페블러스' and EN to 'X Explained in 5 Levels | Pebblous'
All DAL pages use '| Data Art Lab' instead of '| 페블러스' / '| Pebblous'. Standardize brand suffix.
AADS QA dataset pages (138-149) have no <title> tags. Create titles following pattern '[Dataset Name] QA Report | 페블러스/Pebblous'
Most English DataClinic story titles exceed 60 chars. Shorten by removing 'DataClinic' from title (keep in description) and using shorter phrasing.
Many pages have no meta description. While Google can auto-generate these, explicit descriptions control the SERP snippet and improve CTR.

skipList.reason: Benchmark page, 21% CTR, no changes needed
Follows benchmark pattern, no changes needed
Strong curiosity title, follows UrbanGPT pattern
